empty.title: No assets yet
empty.description: Start building your financial picture by adding your first asset — property, accounts, investments, and more.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Asset
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone. All associated beneficiary assignments will also be removed.

toast.deleteFailed: Failed to delete asset. Please try again.

beneficiaryDialog.title: Manage Beneficiaries
beneficiaryDialog.description: Assign contacts to {{name}} with roles and allocation percentages.

addForm.heading: Add Assignment
addForm.perStirpesLabel: Per Stirpes — share passes to descendants if beneficiary predeceases

common.currentValue: What you believe this asset is worth today.
common.purchasePrice: Original amount paid when you acquired this asset.
common.marketValue: Current fair market value from an appraisal or market data — may differ from your estimate.
common.depreciationMethod: How the asset's value decreases over time for tax/accounting purposes.
common.salvageValue: Estimated residual value at the end of the asset's useful life.
common.usefulLifeMonths: Expected number of months this asset will be in productive use.
common.inServiceDate: Date the asset was first put to productive use (starts depreciation).

Vehicle.vin: 17-character Vehicle Identification Number — found on the dashboard near the windshield or on the driver-side door jamb.

RealEstate.propertyType: Classification affects depreciation rules. Only depreciate rental/commercial properties, not your primary residence. Residential rental: 27.5 years, commercial: 39 years. Depreciate the building value only — exclude land.
RealEstate.lotSize: Total land area. Note: land is not depreciated — only the building.

Investment.costBasis: Total amount originally paid for these shares, including commissions and fees. Used to calculate capital gains/losses.
Investment.ticker: Stock exchange symbol (e.g., AAPL for Apple, VTSAX for Vanguard Total Stock Market).
Investment.shares: Number of shares or units you own. Can be fractional (e.g., 10.5).

Retirement.accountType: Type of retirement plan. Tax treatment varies: Traditional/401(k) contributions are pre-tax, Roth contributions are after-tax (tax-free withdrawals).
Retirement.employerMatch: Percentage your employer contributes to match your own contribution.
Retirement.vestedPercent: Percentage of employer contributions you've earned ownership of. 100% means fully vested — you keep all employer contributions if you leave.
Retirement.annualContribution: How much you plan to contribute this year. Subject to IRS annual limits.

BankAccount.accountType: CD = Certificate of Deposit (fixed term, higher rate). HYSA = High-Yield Savings Account. Money Market = savings account with check-writing.
BankAccount.routingNumber: 9-digit ABA number identifying your bank — found on checks or in your online banking settings.
BankAccount.interestRate: Annual Percentage Yield (APY) — the effective yearly interest rate including compounding.
BankAccount.maturityDate: CD only — the date your CD term ends and funds become available without early withdrawal penalty.

Insurance.policyType: Whole Life = permanent coverage with cash value growth. Term Life = coverage for a set period, no cash value. Universal Life = flexible permanent coverage. Annuity = contract that provides an income stream.
Insurance.cashValue: The savings component of a permanent life policy — the amount you'd receive if you surrendered (canceled) the policy today. Not applicable to term life.
Insurance.deathBenefit: Amount paid to your beneficiaries upon death of the insured.
Insurance.premiumAmount: Your regular payment amount to keep the policy active.

Business.entityType: Legal structure. LLC = Limited Liability Company. S-Corp = pass-through taxation. C-Corp = standard corporation (double-taxed).
Business.ownershipPercent: Your ownership stake in the business (1-100%).
Business.ein: Employer Identification Number — the business's federal tax ID (format: XX-XXXXXXX).

Cryptocurrency.coinSymbol: Ticker symbol (e.g., BTC = Bitcoin, ETH = Ethereum, SOL = Solana).
Cryptocurrency.stakingApy: Annual Percentage Yield earned by staking (locking) your coins to help validate the blockchain network.

Collectible.condition: Professional grading scale: Mint = perfect/unused, Excellent = near-perfect, Good = normal wear, Fair = noticeable wear, Poor = significant damage.
Collectible.provenance: Documented chain of ownership and origin — important for authentication and value.

IntellectualProperty.ipType: Patent = invention protection (20 years). Trademark = brand/logo protection (renewable). Copyright = creative work protection. Trade Secret = proprietary information (no registration).
IntellectualProperty.royaltyRate: Percentage of revenue paid to you by licensees for using this IP.
IntellectualProperty.registrationNumber: Official number assigned by the registering authority (USPTO, Copyright Office, etc.).
